p.strong: Production-grade caching layer with horizontal scaling, replication, and failover

ul.li: Layer 1: Single Node Cache: LRU/LFU eviction, TTL expiration, Sharded locks.
Layer 2: Consistent Hashing: Hash ring with virtual nodes, Key routing via binary search.
Layer 3: Replication: Primary-secondary, Phi accrual failure detection, Quorum failover.
Layer 4: Cache Patterns: Cache-aside, Write-through, Single-flight coalescing.
Layer 5: Network: DCP protocol, Connection pooling, Exponential backoff.

div.p: Note: Implementations must ensure robust error handling (connection close, expired entries, pool state integrity).
